---
description: "Write 2 quiz questions based on the selected difficulty"
temperature: 0.5
---

Write exactly 2 short quiz questions. Use multiple-choice format with options A, B, C.

Submit each question using the output tool.

<output target="questions" type="array">
{
  "type": "object",
  "properties": {
    "number": { "type": "number", "description": "Question number" },
    "question": { "type": "string", "description": "The question text" },
    "options": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": { "type": "string" },
      "description": "Answer options A, B, C"
    }
  },
  "required": ["number", "question", "options"]
}
</output>
